site.title: Ashen Descent
site.pitch: Descend into the broken sanctuary. Collect relics of power. Face the ancient guardians. Die. Return. Begin again.

hero.title: ASHEN DESCENT
hero.subtitle: A Dark Fantasy Action Roguelite
hero.tagline: The sanctuary is broken. The rift is shifting. And death is only the beginning.
hero.description: Navigate pseudo-randomized rooms in a shattered sanctuary. Build devastating synergies. Challenge ancient guardians. Die. Return. Begin again.

overview.title: THE GAME
overview.subtitle: A Dark Sanctuary Awaits
overview.description: Ashen Descent is a dark pixel-art action roguelite set in the ruins of an ancient sanctuary. Each run drops you into a shifting rift where every room could be your last. Build powerful relic combinations, master deliberate combat, and gradually restore what was lost.

features.label: Pixel Art Aesthetic
features.desc: Handcrafted 16-bit visuals with ember glow and ruined stone

features.label: Soulslike Combat
features.desc: Deliberate rhythm, punishing enemies, rewarding mastery

features.label: Permanent Progression
features.desc: Death带走一切 except your determination

features.label: Hub Restoration
features.desc: Gradually rebuild the Ember Temple between runs

features.label: Meaningful Death
features.desc: Painful enough to matter, forgiving enough to continue

world.title: THE WORLD
world.subtitle: A Sanctuary Forged in Ash
world.intro: Once, the Ember Temple stood as the holiest ground in the realm. Pilgrims came from distant lands to bask in its eternal warmth. Then the Cataclysm struck.

lore.title: The Cataclysm
lore.desc: The sanctuary shattered in a single night. Reality fractured. Space twisted. The temple became a labyrinth of floating ruins and hungry rifts.

lore.title: The Ember Altar
lore.desc: At the heart of the chaos, the Altar remains—the only stable ground. Those who enter the rift are pulled back to it, endlessly, as if the sanctuary demands sacrifice.

lore.title: The Shifting Rift
lore.desc: The sanctuary exists between worlds now. Rooms materialize and dissolve like breath. No two runs feel the same. The rift itself seems alive—hungry.

lore.title: Relics of Power
lore.desc: Scattered throughout the ruins are ancient relics—fragments of the temple's former glory. Each holds immense power. Most are corrupted. All are dangerous.

lore.title: The Guardians
lore.desc: The ancient protectors of the temple still wander the ruins. Twisted by the Cataclysm, they remember nothing but their purpose: to eliminate intruders.

world.closing: You are not the first to descend. You will not be the last. But perhaps—perhaps you will be the one to restore what was broken.

loop.title: The Run Loop
loop.desc: Every descent follows the same rhythm. Enter. Fight. Choose. Adapt. Die or prevail.

steps.title: Enter the Rift
steps.desc: Step through the Ember Altar into the shifting sanctuary

steps.title: Navigate Rooms
steps.desc: Combat through randomized chambers, each with unique challenges

steps.title: Fight Enemies
steps.desc: Learn patterns, time your strikes, survive

steps.title: Choose Rewards
steps.desc: Select from offered relics—shape your build with every choice

steps.title: Face the Boss
steps.desc: A multi-phase guardian that tests everything you've learned

steps.title: Die or Prevail
steps.desc: Resolve the outcome—loss or victory, both teach

steps.title: Return to Altar
steps.desc: What survives the journey back comes home with you

steps.title: Prepare & Repeat
steps.desc: Spend preserved resources, try a new approach, descend again

controls.title: Controls
controls.moveDesc: Responsive WASD/Arrow controls with deliberate acceleration
controls.dashDesc: Quick dodge with brief recovery—timing is everything
controls.attackDesc: Windup, active frames, recovery—true to soulslike rhythm
controls.interactDesc: Collect relics, open doors, activate altars

categories.title: Player Control
categories.desc: Precise 8-directional movement with acceleration curves. Dash with recovery frames. Every input feels deliberate and weighty.

categories.title: Combat Rhythm
categories.desc: Hit-stop on impact. Screen shake on heavy hits. Stamina management forces rest between attacks. Timing rewards patience.

categories.title: Enemy Design
categories.desc: Each type has distinct telegraphs and response windows. Aggressive but fair. Pattern recognition is the primary skill.

categories.title: Room Structure
categories.desc: 4-5 handcrafted templates with pseudo-random enemy placement. Clear entry points. Strategic chokepoints.

categories.title: Reward Choice
categories.desc: After each room, choose from 2-3 relics. Build direction emerges from choices, not templates.

categories.title: Boss Encounters
categories.desc: Multi-phase guardians with distinct attack patterns. Safe windows. Adaptation is survival.

categories.title: Hub Progression
categories.desc: The Ember Altar is home base. Permanent upgrades, restoration progress, and lore fragments accumulate.

categories.title: Meta Resources
categories.desc: Ember banking, sanctuary restoration, unlockable relics. Long-term goals beyond any single run.

death.title: DEATH & RISK
death.subtitle: The Cost of Hubris
death.intro: In the sanctuary, death is not the end. But it is never free.

lost.title: Lost in Death
lost.desc: When you fall, the rift claims most of what you carried:
items: All run-specific relics and temporary build pieces
Unpurified ember collected during the run
Progress toward the current room or boss

preserved.title: Survives Death
preserved.desc: Only the truly worthy escapes the rift:
items: Permanent hub upgrades and restoration progress
Small ember reserve (banked at altar before descent)
Character level and intrinsic stat growth
Unlocked relic blueprints for future runs

design.title: Design Philosophy
design.quote: Death should feel like a punch to the gut—not a kick to the teeth. The player should think 'one more try' not 'why bother.'
design.intent: Painful enough to create tension. Forgiving enough to preserve momentum. The line between frustrating and motivating is razor-thin.

builds.title: BUILD ARCHETYPES
builds.subtitle: Forge Your Path
builds.intro: Every relic combination tells a story. Every build has a rhythm.

archetypes.title: Berserker
archetypes.desc: Embrace the fury. Sacrifice defense for raw damage output. Die fast or kill faster.
archetypes.playstyle: Aggressive positioning, frame-perfect dodges, glass cannon

archetypes.title: Warden
archetypes.desc: Become the immovable object. Shield relics, damage reduction, sustained healing.
archetypes.playstyle: Patient defense, punish windows, attrition warfare

archetypes.title: Riftwalker
archetypes.desc: Balance is key. Hybrid relics create unique synergies. Versatile but demanding.
archetypes.relics: Balanced stats, unique interactions, special effects

bosses.title: BOSS ENCOUNTERS
bosses.subtitle: Face the Guardians
bosses.intro: Each boss is a final exam. Everything you've learned—pattern recognition, build optimization, nerve—tested in one decisive encounter.

phases.title: Multi-Phase Battles
phases.desc: Bosses transform as their health drops. New attacks. New patterns. New challenges.

design.title: Fair but Ruthless
design.desc: Every attack is telegraphed. Every safe window is findable. But execution demands composure.

bosses.cta: Will you overcome, or will you fall and return stronger?

art.title: ART & VISUAL STYLE
art.subtitle: Beauty in Ruin
art.intro: A shattered sanctuary. Floating ruins. Ember light in the darkness. We build atmosphere pixel by pixel.

pillars.title: Dark Fantasy Palette
pillars.desc: Deep stone grays, ember oranges, shadow blacks. Warm light against cold ruins.

pillars.title: Pixel Art Excellence
pillars.desc: Handcrafted sprites with care. Every pixel earns its place.

pillars.title: Unified Direction
pillars.desc: Consistency over variety. Limited sources, maximum cohesion.

pillars.title: Atmospheric Effects
pillars.desc: Particle embers, flickering light, subtle parallax. The world feels alive.

art.asset_note: All assets are properly licensed and credited. We build within constraints—we do not compromise on vision.

roadmap.title: DEVELOPMENT ROADMAP
roadmap.subtitle: From Vision to Reality
roadmap.intro: A carefully scoped path to release. Each version builds on the last.

versions.name: Foundation
versions.purpose: Establish the foundation—movement, combat skeleton, art standards, and project infrastructure.
versions.why: A stable foundation prevents costly rewrites. Core systems must be solid before content creation begins.

versions.name: Minimum Viable
versions.purpose: Deliver a full run from hub to boss to return. The complete Ashen Descent experience.
versions.why: v1.0 is the promise: a finished game you can play start to finish. Not a preview. A complete experience.

versions.name: Polish Pass
versions.purpose: Refine moment-to-moment sensation. Screen shake, sound, UI feedback, and flow tuning.
versions.why: How a game feels is often more important than what it has. Polish transforms 'good' into 'memorable.'

versions.name: Signature Features
versions.purpose: Introduce defining mechanics that make Ashen Descent unique among roguelites.
versions.why: Every great roguelite has a signature hook. This version defines what Ashen Descent truly is.

versions.name: Expanded Scope
versions.purpose: Blow out content while maintaining quality. More variety, more reasons to keep playing.
versions.why: Optional ambition. Only pursue if v2.0 is polished and there's sustained interest.

timeline.title: 8-WEEK PLAN
timeline.subtitle: Road to v1.0
timeline.intro: A realistic timeline for a realistic scope. Eight weeks to a complete, playable demo.

weeks.title: Foundation
weeks.focus: Standards, folder structure, engine, movement base

weeks.title: Combat Systems
weeks.focus: Enemies, health systems, basic UI, first rooms

weeks.title: Full Loop
weeks.focus: Boss, death resolution, hub return, v1.0 complete

play.title: PLAY THE DEMO
play.subtitle: Experience the Rift
play.description: v1.0 is the minimum complete experience. A full run loop from the Ember Altar to the boss and back.
play.note: The demo is coming. Until then, explore this site to learn about the world, the mechanics, and the vision.

footer.credits: Ashen Descent is a personal project. Built with passion. All assets used under their respective licenses.
